data.title: Bitcoin Dominance Nears Death Cross, Ethereum Eyes $3,430
data.description: Bitcoin dominance is approaching a rare monthly death cross, a signal seen only twice before, according to BeInCrypto. Analyst Matthew Hyland notes that the slower yellow moving average is set to cross below the faster white moving average around June 2026, historically leading to sharp drops in dominance and rotations into altcoins. Meanwhile, Ethereum trades at $2,280, targeting a potential breakout to $3,430. The convergence of technical indicators suggests a possible altcoin season, with Ethereum's price action and Bitcoin's dominance level being key triggers to watch.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Sells 10,000 ETH in OTC Deal to Fund Operations
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has completed an over-the-counter (OTC) transaction, selling 10,000 ETH at an average price of $2,292.15. According to NS3.AI, BitMNR acted as the counterparty in this transaction. The foundation stated that the proceeds from the sale will be used to support its core operations. This recent sale is part of a series of OTC transactions, with the foundation's last three sales totaling 25,000 ETH, amounting to approximately $57 million.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,300 USDT with a 1.54% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 01, 2026, 20:28 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,300 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,300.409912 USDT, with a narrowed 1.54% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Stablecoin Usage Rises, Market Cap Growth May Not Follow, JPMorgan Analysts Say
data.description: JPMorgan analysts have observed that the increasing use of stablecoins might not lead to proportional growth in market capitalization. According to NS3.AI, the onchain stablecoin transaction volume is currently running at an annual pace of approximately $17.2 trillion this year. The analysts noted that higher stablecoin velocity allows the same supply to facilitate more transactions. JPMorgan reported that the stablecoin market cap has expanded by nearly $100 billion over the past year and surpasses $300 billion when yield-bearing stablecoins are included.

data.title: Exodus Completes Acquisitions to Enhance On-Chain Payments
data.description: Exodus has finalized the acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx UK, integral components of a deal valued at approximately $175 million aimed at developing an on-chain payments infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, these acquisitions enable Exodus to directly issue and process payment cards. Additionally, Exodus Pay is now operational across all 50 states. Preliminary results for the first quarter indicate a decline in revenue to $22.7 million, down from $36.0 million in the same period last year.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Market Mixed as Apple and SanDisk Surge on Strong Q1 Earnings
data.description: The U.S. stock market closed with mixed results, as the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 0.31%, while the S&P 500 Index rose by 0.29%, and the Nasdaq Composite Index increased by 0.89%. According to Jin10, the positive performance was driven by strong first-quarter earnings reports. Apple (AAPL.O) saw a significant rise, closing up 3.24%, while SanDisk (SNDK.O) surged by 8.25%. Intel (INTC.O) also experienced a notable increase, climbing 5.44% to reach a record closing price of $99.62.

data.title: Gency AI Secures $20 Million to Expand Decentralized Advertising Network
data.description: Gency AI has successfully raised $20 million in a recent funding round aimed at scaling its decentralized advertising execution and settlement network. According to NS3.AI, the company plans to utilize the funds to enhance its privacy-preserving computing stack and expedite product deployment. Additionally, Gency AI intends to foster ecosystem partnerships across North America, Asia, and Europe.

data.title: XRP Social Media Sentiment Surges, Yet Price Faces Resistance
data.description: XRP's social media sentiment has increased by 240% over the past 30 days, reaching a two-year high. According to NS3.AI, this surge in optimism is attributed to XRP's integration with Rakuten Wallet. However, despite the positive sentiment, XRP's price remains constrained below the $1.40-$1.45 resistance zone. Glassnode data indicates that approximately 2 billion XRP are held within this cost range, suggesting significant market activity at these levels.

data.title: U.S. Public Debt Surpasses GDP, Impacts Bitcoin Scarcity Thesis
data.description: U.S. public debt reached $31.27 trillion at the end of the first quarter of 2026, slightly exceeding the trailing 12-month nominal GDP of $31.22 trillion, according to CRFB. This results in a debt-to-GDP ratio of 100.2%, providing a new fiscal reference point for Bitcoin's scarcity thesis. However, the Bureau of Economic Analysis notes that this figure is an advance estimate and may be subject to change.

data.title: MegaETH Deposits Surge Following MEGA Token Launch
data.description: MegaETH experienced a significant increase in deposits on Aave, surpassing $575 million on Friday, shortly after the launch of the MEGA token. According to NS3.AI, the platform had approximately $355 million in total DeFi deposits when the token generation event commenced on Thursday. MegaETH's mainnet was launched on February 9, with Aave operational from the first day, pledging at least $10 million in revenue to the Aave DAO over a five-year period.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Fed Official Bowman on Regulating New Technologies Like Anthropic's Mythos
data.description: Federal Reserve's top banking regulator, Bowman, emphasized the need for regulatory bodies to consider the best ways to oversee emerging technologies like Anthropic's Mythos. According to Jin10, Bowman noted that while such capabilities can enhance cybersecurity by allowing companies to address vulnerabilities they identify, they also pose risks if misused to exploit weaknesses. As Anthropic evaluates safeguards for this powerful new technology, it has restricted the release of its latest AI model. This development has prompted officials in U.S. President Donald Trump's administration to consider the potential for cyberattacks that could threaten financial stability.

data.title: ChangeNOW Releases 'Beyond the Hype' Documentary
data.description: ChangeNOW has launched its first-ever feature documentary, "Beyond the Hype," marking a significant evolution in its journey from a simple exchange tool to a global infrastructure supporting over 8 million users, 1,500 assets, and 110 networks. According to BeInCrypto, the documentary explores the purpose behind the platform, inviting the crypto community to reflect on its mission. The film is available on ChangeNOW's official YouTube channel and features voices from across the decentralized economy, including strategic partners and media ambassadors. ChangeNOW extends gratitude to the BeInCrypto team for their contribution.

data.title: Mexico to Simplify Bureaucratic Procedures to Boost Private Investment
data.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum announced plans to unveil measures on Monday aimed at enhancing private investment in the country. Bloomberg posted on X that the initiative will focus on a 'radical simplification' of bureaucratic processes. This move is part of a broader strategy to attract more private sector involvement and stimulate economic growth in Mexico. The government aims to create a more business-friendly environment by reducing red tape and streamlining administrative procedures. Further details of the measures are expected to be disclosed during the announcement.

data.title: Exodus Becomes UFC's Official Payments Partner in Multi-Year Deal
data.description: Exodus has announced a multi-year partnership with the UFC, becoming its official payments partner starting June 1. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration coincides with the launch of Exodus Pay, a self-custody money app available across all 50 states. The app supports Apple Pay, bank transfers, and existing cryptocurrency balances, offering users a comprehensive financial management tool.

data.title: Paradigm Researcher Proposes PACTs Model for Bitcoin Security
data.description: A researcher from Paradigm has introduced a timestamp-based model named PACTs, designed to assist Bitcoin holders in proving previous control over their wallets in the event that quantum attacks become feasible. According to NS3.AI, this proposal seeks to safeguard inactive holdings, such as coins from the Satoshi era, without necessitating the movement of funds onchain at present.

data.title: AI-Generated Profiles Target XRP Las Vegas Conference Attendees
data.description: Romance scammers have been using AI-generated images of women to target attendees and followers at the XRP Las Vegas conference. According to NS3.AI, these fake profiles were highlighted by XRP Ledger validator Vet on Friday morning. The conference, which concludes today, is being held at the Paris casino in Las Vegas.

data.title: Mercuria Secures Agreements for Venezuelan Commodities and Metals
data.description: Mercuria has successfully negotiated several agreements to acquire Venezuelan bulk commodities and metals, including gold. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this as a recent instance of trading houses facilitating investment deals in Venezuela. These agreements underscore Mercuria's strategic efforts to expand its portfolio and strengthen its presence in the region's commodity market. The deals reflect a broader trend of international trading firms seeking opportunities in Venezuela's resource-rich landscape, despite the country's challenging economic environment.

data.title: Galoy Expands Bitcoin Banking Platform for U.S. Financial Institutions
data.description: Galoy has broadened its Bitcoin-native banking platform to cater to U.S. banks and credit unions, integrating six essential use cases into a single system. According to NS3.AI, the platform encompasses BTC-backed lending, Lightning payments, stablecoin transactions, Bitcoin exchange under the OCC's riskless principal model, custody solutions, and embedded wallets. Galoy stated that the software functions as a sidecar to existing legacy core systems, offering additional tools for regulatory guidance, portfolio analysis, and loan-to-value risk scenarios.

data.title: Skyline Builders and Cove Kaz Form Kaz Resources for Kazakhstan Tungsten Project
data.description: Skyline Builders has partnered with Cove Kaz to establish Kaz Resources, a company set to be listed on Nasdaq, focusing on a tungsten project in Kazakhstan. According to NS3.AI, the project has attracted interest from the Export-Import Bank of the United States (EXIM) and the U.S. International Development Finance Corporation (DFC), with potential financial backing of up to $900 million and $700 million, respectively. Financial Times reported that Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump gained exposure to Skyline through American Ventures in 2025, connecting them to the entity behind this proposed venture. The agency letters of interest are conditional and not binding, and there is no indication that the Trump sons were aware of or influenced the government support process.

data.title: Meta Platforms to Acquire Assured Robot Intelligence
data.description: Meta Platforms (META.O) is in the process of acquiring Assured Robot Intelligence, according to Jin10. The specific terms of the deal have not yet been disclosed.
